title: nonux component manifest
description: Per-component manifest.json — declares a component's name, version, and dependencies. Consumed by tools/gen-config.py and tools/validate-config.py.

name.description: Unique component name — must be a valid C identifier.

iface.description: The interface this component implements (scheduler, vfs, etc.). Optional for 3.5 — matching against kernel.json slot iface is a 3.7 concern.

requires.description: Required dependencies. Missing at boot → framework panics.

optional.description: Optional dependencies. Missing is fine; slot pointer stays NULL.

spawns_threads.description: True if the component spawns kernel threads of its own (not just the dispatcher). Must also set pause_hook: true so the pause protocol can quiesce the threads within the 1 ms deadline. Default: false.

pause_hook.description: True if the component implements ops->pause_hook to quiesce its own threads / timers during pause. Required when spawns_threads is true. Default: false.

version.description: Version constraint on the target component. Only the >= operator is supported in v1.

mode.description: IPC mode for the connection. Default: async.

stateful.description: Whether the connection carries state. Default: false.

policy.description: Pause-protocol policy when the target pauses. Default: queue.
